per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The commands were somewhat effective but lacked precision in addressing all critical issues.
The student integrated feedback on fragility but missed addressing the weight sorting and simulation details.
The student did not focus on optimizing the efficiency of the solution, particularly in terms of clarifying weight sorting and simulation assumptions.

justification: The student demonstrated insufficient understanding by missing critical issues in efficiency optimization and providing only partial solutions in corrective commands and feedback integration.
